items.description: Small-cell lung cancer (SCLC) is an aggressive neuroendocrine malignancy characterized by rapid proliferation, early metastasis, and poor prognosis. items.description: CONCLUSIONS: The acquisition of exercise habits may lead to a sustained improvement in work engagement, a crucial psychological resource for employees.
